{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell's previous owner was called the Shining Valkyrie. To show its faith and loyalty, it found a master craftsman to forge this Snail Shell. In return, it gained a blessed spear and started its own journey.
|affct=FTH
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=3410
|relic1=Golden Scarab
|relic2=Holy Loaves
|relic3=Athena Statue
|relic4=Horn of Heimdall
|relic5=Holy Nail
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Angel
|element=Wind
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=HP
}}
